title: Ornith (35B,9B) + Hermes,Zed: THE FULLY PRIVATE LOCAL AGENT is ACTUALLY HERE!
summary: Ornith is a family of open-source agentic coding models from DeepReinforce, available in sizes from 9B to 397B parameters and built on Gemma and Qwen. The models are designed for coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, with versions available in GGUF format for local deployment.
writeup: The video covers Ornith, an open-source family of agentic coding models from DeepReinforce that spans 9B to 397B parameters and is built on Gemma and Qwen. The models target coding, tool use, and agentic workflows, and ship in GGUF format for local deployment. The framing of a fully private local agent matters because GGUF availability enables local inference without sending code to external services. The walkthrough pairs the models with Hermes and Zed to run agentic coding workflows.
